ownedComment.body: Auth\LoginController, Auth\LogoutController Admin\DashboardController, ProductController, StockController, UserController Admin\CustomerController, OrderController, InvoiceController, OfferController Sales\DashboardController, Sales\OfferController Customer\DashboardController PublicOrderController, ChatBotController

Admin: dashboard, user, product, stock, customer, order, invoice, offer Sales: dashboard, assigned offers, sales record Customer: dashboard Public: view order link, upload payment proof Chat: operational Q&A, product/customer/order snippets, simple CRUD intent
users, sessions, cache, jobs customers, sales, sales_targets products, stocks offers, offers_items, offers_sales, offers_records, offers_record_items orders, orders_items, invoices, payments

admin sales customer public order viewer
